result.text:
“(in)vulnerability”. part 1

I’d love to share my project.
It’s dedicated to those who have experienced bullying and is based on my personal story.
The goal of this project is to challenge the idea that bullying “builds character.” No.
It breaks you, leaving only fragments that you have to piece together to start trusting people again.

𝘭𝘪𝘬𝘦 𝘢 𝘧𝘭𝘢𝘴𝘩 𝘪𝘯 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘯𝘪𝘨𝘩𝘵
⭑ 𝘪 𝘮𝘪𝘯𝘵𝘦𝘥 𝘮𝘺 𝘧𝘪𝘳𝘴𝘵 𝘸𝘰𝘳𝘬 ⭑

BURN OR BLOOM

𝘣𝘶𝘳𝘯𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘣𝘭𝘰𝘰𝘮𝘪𝘯𝘨  𝘣𝘭𝘦𝘦𝘥𝘪𝘯𝘨
this series explores the fragile line between destruction and transformation. the flaming flower • both a symbol of resilience and fragility • becomes a paradox: to bloom is to burn, to hold is to be wounded. yet, even in pain, something persists, something survives. is it beauty, or just the will to exist?
